actions.text: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.
Anchor the stable panel on both sides of the horizontal midpoint crease.

actions.direction: free panel moves toward the executor over the marked crease
actions.text: Move the free panel along the horizontal midpoint crease as a valley fold.

actions.target: left midpoint and right midpoint overlap within visual tolerance
actions.text: Align left midpoint with right midpoint without letting the anchored panel slide.
Press along the full horizontal midpoint crease from left midpoint to right midpoint.
Release the moving panel while keeping the new valley crease visible.

alignment_target.target: left midpoint and right midpoint overlap within visual tolerance
alignment_target.text: Align left midpoint with right midpoint without letting the anchored panel slide.

anchor_grip.text: Anchor the stable panel on both sides of the horizontal midpoint crease.

annotations.direction: free panel moves toward the executor over the marked crease

checks: The new valley crease is visible on the horizontal midpoint crease.
No boundary edge has moved outside the source square.

crease_press.text: Press along the full horizontal midpoint crease from left midpoint to right midpoint.

landmark_language.center: Use the intersection of diagonals or midpoint creases.
landmark_language.corners: Identify named paper corners by their visible square positions.
landmark_language.crease_line: Follow the visible dashed or pressed line across the paper.
landmark_language.edges: Use the visible paper boundary as the reference edge.
landmark_language.midpoint: Find the halfway point between two adjacent corners by eye.

executor_profile_definition.name: Human hand
risk_notes: Paper can slide if the stable panel is not held before the fold.
A fingertip may occlude midpoint landmarks during alignment.

failure_modes: If the paper slides, re-anchor near left midpoint and repeat the fold slowly.
Human hand: Paper can slide if the stable panel is not held before the fold.

fold_direction.direction: free panel moves toward the executor over the marked crease
fold_direction.text: Move the free panel along the horizontal midpoint crease as a valley fold.

steps.pre_state: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.

release.text: Release the moving panel while keeping the new valley crease visible.

steps.title: Add a tail centerline valley

actions.text: Paper lies flat with the target face up and the reference square visible.
Anchor the stable panel on both sides of the main diagonal crease.

actions.direction: free panel moves away from the executor over the marked crease
actions.text: Move the free panel along the main diagonal crease as a mountain fold.

actions.target: top-left corner and bottom-right corner overlap within visual tolerance
actions.text: Align top-left corner with bottom-right corner without letting the anchored panel slide.
Press along the full main diagonal crease from top-left corner to bottom-right corner.
Release the moving panel while keeping the new mountain crease visible.

alignment_target.target: top-left corner and bottom-right corner overlap within visual tolerance
alignment_target.text: Align top-left corner with bottom-right corner without letting the anchored panel slide.

anchor_grip.text: Anchor the stable panel on both sides of the main diagonal crease.

checks: The new mountain crease is visible on the main diagonal crease.

crease_press.text: Press along the full main diagonal crease from top-left corner to bottom-right corner.

landmark_language.crease_line: Follow the visible dashed or pressed line across the paper.
landmark_language.edges: Use the visible paper boundary as the reference edge.
